office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Brandy Donaghy faces Navy veteran and small-business owner Chris Elder, who emphasizes lower taxes, accountable spending, and public safety.

candidates.summary: Donaghy is an incumbent representative with emergency-management and community-organizing experience focused on preparedness, housing, transportation, veterans, and reproductive rights.
highlights: Emphasizes emergency preparedness, housing, and transportation [S2][S3]
Supports reproductive rights and community safety [S2][S3]

experience.basis: She has served in the House since 2021 and reports a legislative record across several issue areas.

candidates.summary: Elder is a Navy veteran, farmer, and small-business owner emphasizing lower taxes, spending accountability, first responders, and law-enforcement capacity.
highlights: Supports lower taxes and accountable spending [S2]
Supports first responders and law-enforcement capacity alongside prevention [S2]

safety.basis: He emphasizes first responders and law-enforcement capacity while also mentioning prevention.

experience.basis: He has extensive military and business experience but no documented elected office.
